title: Current-stack second add-on retry
hypothesis: A second smaller day-5 follow-through add-on may improve lifecycle alpha by allocating more budget only to positions that already absorbed the day-2 add-on and continue to outperform SPY.
summary: Retest failed: only one second add-on executed; aggregate EV and PnL regressed slightly.
next_action: Do not retry second-add-on size/cap without event/news or lifecycle discriminator.
